visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with old objects, a man with platinum blonde hair and two other men in dark suits point their wands forward. The scene cuts to a woman with brown hair and glasses, also pointing a wand, as a man in a dark suit stands behind her. The view then shifts to an overhead shot of the room, showing the figures scattered among the debris.
audio_description: A loud, distorted sound effect plays, followed by a male voice shouting in a foreign language.
